metadata.title: Common Structural and Pressure Vessel Plates
metadata.description: Commonly used plate materials for pressure vessels, structural, and industrial applications

materials.name: Carbon Steel A36 Plate
materials.description: Structural carbon steel plate for general construction and fabrication

materials.name: Carbon Steel SA 516 Gr 60 Plate
materials.description: Pressure vessel quality carbon steel plate for moderate and lower temperature service

materials.name: Carbon Steel SA 516 Gr 70 Plate
materials.description: Pressure vessel quality carbon steel plate for moderate and lower temperature service

materials.name: Stainless Steel 304 Plate
materials.description: Austenitic stainless steel plate for general corrosion resistance

materials.name: Stainless Steel 304L Plate
materials.description: Low carbon austenitic stainless steel plate with improved weldability

materials.name: Stainless Steel 316 Plate
materials.description: Molybdenum-bearing austenitic stainless steel plate for improved corrosion resistance

materials.name: Stainless Steel 316L Plate
materials.description: Low carbon molybdenum-bearing austenitic stainless steel plate

materials.name: Stainless Steel 321 Plate
materials.description: Titanium-stabilized austenitic stainless steel plate for high temperature service

materials.name: Duplex Steel 2205 Plate
materials.description: Duplex stainless steel plate with high strength and excellent corrosion resistance

materials.name: Super Duplex Steel 2507 Plate
materials.description: Super duplex stainless steel plate for severe corrosive environments

materials.name: Alloy Steel P11 Plate
materials.description: 1.25Cr-0.5Mo alloy steel plate for elevated temperature service

materials.name: Alloy Steel P22 Plate
materials.description: 2.25Cr-1Mo alloy steel plate for high temperature service

materials.name: Alloy Steel P91 Plate
materials.description: 9Cr-1Mo-V alloy steel plate for very high temperature service

materials.name: Lean Duplex Steel 2101 Plate (UNS S32101)
materials.description: Lean duplex stainless steel plate for structural and pressure applications

materials.name: Lean Duplex Steel 2304 Plate (UNS S32304)
materials.description: Lean duplex stainless steel plate with good corrosion resistance

materials.name: Super Duplex Steel Zeron 100 Plate (UNS S32760)
materials.description: Super duplex stainless steel plate for highly corrosive environments
